title: Emmiganūr Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Emmiganūr with a Z-Score of +3.83. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Emmiganūr is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 63%, and the wind speed is 7.6 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The Heat Wave has resulted in a critical situation, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating the severity of the heat.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this heat wave.
